CyclomaticComplexMethod:NetworkUtil.kt$inline fun <ResultType, RequestType> networkBoundResource( crossinline query: suspend () -> Flow<ResultType>, // 🔹 Obtiene datos del cache local crossinline fetch: suspend () -> RequestType, // 🔹 Llama al API remoto crossinline saveFetchResult: suspend (RequestType) -> Unit, // 🔹 Guarda el resultado remoto crossinline shouldFetch: suspend (ResultType) -> Boolean = { true }, // 🔹 Condición opcional de refresco crossinline onFetchFailed: (Throwable) -> Unit = {}, // 🔹 Manejo opcional de errores traceName: String = "networkBoundResource", fetchTtlMillis: Long? = null, noinline resolveLocalUpdatedAtMillis: (suspend (ResultType) -> Long?)? = null, ): Flow<Resource<ResultType>>

LongParameterList:SyncManager.kt$SyncManager$( private val bootstrapSyncRepository: BootstrapSyncRepository, private val syncPreferences: SyncPreferences, private val syncLogPreferences: SyncLogPreferences, private val generalPreferences: GeneralPreferences, private val cashBoxManager: CashBoxManager, private val networkMonitor: NetworkMonitor, private val sessionRefresher: SessionRefresher, private val syncContextProvider: SyncContextProvider, private val pushSyncManager: PushSyncRunner, private val bootstrapContextPreferences: BootstrapContextPreferences, )
MaxLineLength:AppStrings.kt$AppStringsFactory$"Trabaja con datos locales. Las ventas y cambios pendientes se sincronizan cuando vuelve la conexión."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"Factura ${(created?.name ?: localInvoiceName)} creada, pero falló la actualización de inventario local. Reintenta sincronización/recarga."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"Invoice ${(created?.name ?: localInvoiceName)} was created, but local inventory update failed. Retry sync/reload."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"La venta está marcada como crédito, pero el pago excede el total. Desactiva \"Venta de crédito\" para registrarla como contado."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"La venta está marcada como crédito, pero el pago ya cubre el total. Desactiva \"Venta de crédito\" para registrarla como contado."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"Sale is marked as credit, but payment already covers the total. Disable \"Credit sale\" to register it as cash."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"Sale is marked as credit, but payment exceeds total. Disable \"Credit sale\" to register it as cash."
MaxLineLength:BillingViewModel.kt$BillingViewModel$"Una venta de crédito no puede tener pago completo. Desactiva \"Venta de crédito\" para registrarla como contado."
MaxLineLength:CashBoxManager.kt$CashBoxManager$"cash-movement: type=pay profile=${ctx.profileName} cashbox=$cashboxId mode=$mode amount=$amount openingNow=$remaining note=${note?.trim().orEmpty()}"

MaxLineLength:CashBoxManager.kt$CashBoxManager$"cash-movement: type=receive profile=${ctx.profileName} cashbox=$cashboxId mode=$mode amount=$amount openingBefore=$opening openingNow=${opening + amount} note=${note?.trim().orEmpty()}"

MaxLineLength:CashBoxManager.kt$CashBoxManager$"internal-transfer: profile=${ctx.profileName} cashbox=$cashboxId from=$sourceMode to=$targetMode amount=$amount fromRemaining=$remaining toNow=$targetNow note=${note?.trim().orEmpty()}"

MaxLineLength:CashBoxManager.kt$CashBoxManager$"supplier-payment-outflow: profile=${ctx.profileName} cashbox=$cashboxId mode=$mode amount=$amount availableBefore=${roundMoney(available)} availableAfter=$projected note=${note?.trim().orEmpty()}"
MaxLineLength:CashboxDao.kt$CashboxDao$"UPDATE tabCashbox SET status = :status, pendingSync = :pendingSync, closingEntryId = :pceId, periodEndDate = :endDate WHERE localId = :localId"
MaxLineLength:CustomerDao.kt$CustomerDao$"SELECT * FROM customers WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND customerName LIKE '%' || :search || '%' ORDER BY customerName ASC"

MaxLineLength:ItemDao.kt$ItemDao$"SELECT * FROM tabitem WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE '%' || :search || '%' OR description LIKE '%' || :search || '%' OR brand LIKE '%' || :search || '%' OR itemGroup LIKE '%' || :search || '%') ORDER BY name ASC"
MaxLineLength:PaymentEntryScreen.kt$"Selecciona las facturas a las que se aplicará este pago. La asignación se calcula automáticamente según el monto en la moneda de la cuenta de pago."
MaxLineLength:PaymentEntryViewModel.kt$PaymentEntryViewModel$"Pago a proveedor registrado por $amount desde $sourceMode. Vuelto a favor: ${roundMoney(changeInFavor)} ${current.currencyCode}."
MaxLineLength:SalesInvoiceDao.kt$SalesInvoiceDao$"SELECT * FROM tabSalesInvoice WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND customer_name LIKE '%' || :search || '%' ORDER BY customer_name ASC"

MaxLineLength:SalesInvoiceDao.kt$SalesInvoiceDao$"SELECT * FROM tabSalesInvoice WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND due_date < :today AND outstanding_amount > 0 AND status IN ('Overdue', 'Unpaid', 'Partly Paid') ORDER BY due_date ASC"

MaxLineLength:SalesInvoiceDao.kt$SalesInvoiceDao$"SELECT * FROM tabSalesInvoice WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND posting_date BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate AND due_date < :today AND outstanding_amount > 0 ORDER BY due_date ASC"
MaxLineLength:SalesInvoiceDao.kt$SalesInvoiceDao$"SELECT * FROM tabSalesInvoice WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND posting_date BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate ORDER BY posting_date DESC"

NestedBlockDepth:PaymentHandler.kt$PaymentHandler$suspend fun registerPayments( paymentLines: List<PaymentLine>, createdInvoice: SalesInvoiceDto?, invoiceNameForLocal: String, postingDate: String, context: POSContext, customer: CustomerBO, exchangeRateByCurrency: Map<String, Double>, paymentModeDetails: Map<String, ModeOfPaymentEntity>, posOpeningEntry: String?, ): PaymentRegistrationResult

UseCheckOrError:APIService.kt$APIService$throw IllegalStateException("Sales Invoice $name no encontrada en bootstrap")

UseCheckOrError:CancelSalesInvoiceUseCase.kt$CancelSalesInvoiceUseCase$throw IllegalStateException("La factura tiene pagos; usa retorno o reembolso.")
UseCheckOrError:CancelSalesInvoiceUseCase.kt$CancelSalesInvoiceUseCase$throw IllegalStateException("La factura ya fue retornada por completo.")
